main.description: Metadata for a group. A group is a space of type `network.habitat.group`; this profile record is the group-space's self record, holding its display name and description. Group membership is expressed as roles on the group-space (any role implies membership), and the group is used as a grantee elsewhere via a network.habitat.relationship.defs#spaceRoleSubject that references the group-space with role 'reader'.
